title: Config 5: sgd width=512 depth=1 batch=32 aug=none
methodology: Generated a 1-hidden-layer MLP with width 512, batch size 32, sgd at lr=0.001, dropout=0.2, weight_decay=0.0001, augmentation=none, and label_smoothing=0.02.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
